name: Feature Request

---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the gap it would fill.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that would help.
